message:
fix(main): add missing is_supervised field to RobotCandidate

Add is_supervised: false to RobotCandidate initializers in run_agent_apply
to fix build errors after RobotCandidate struct was extended with the
is_supervised field.

This is a stub value - actual supervision detection should be wired in
when the supervisor-aware features are complete.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
